title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DTDC

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at DTDC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at DTDC. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About DTDC:
DTDC is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DTDC!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
